abilities.name: Accomplice
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, a friendly model within 6" that has not activated this turn may discard a card to do so.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

abilities.name: Wilds of Malifaux
abilities.text: The area within 6" of this model is severe and concealing terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

actions.name: Knotted Staff
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (+) if the target is not engaged with this model.

triggers.name: This is My Mountain
triggers.text: Place this model anywhere within 6", at a higher elevation. Allies within (aura)4" gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: Sense Weakness
actions.effects: Target gains an Adversary token. If this action receives a raise, a friendly beast may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Call of the Wild
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally or friendly beast only. Move the target up to its Sp.

triggers.name: Hunter's Call
triggers.text: When resolving, instead of moving, the target declares the Charge action.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Caudal Lure
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker anywhere within range. Enemy models within (aura)3" of the marker must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be moved 3" directly toward the marker.
